value.0: BBS Scribe Cloth
Scribe
Your message is inscribed on this paper. You may post it on any bulletin board.
Bulletin Board Notice

Instrucions:

First click this sign. It will tell you a list of players with their names next to numbers.

Once you see this list, you have to click on one of the 47 signs lined up beside this sign, depending on which player you want to look at. When you do the sign will tell you who that player is in party with, their levels and their alignments.

This is used for checking if people are powerleveling, braking some rules, or who is in the party exploiting a bug, etc etc. Many uses!

Aldaron
DM Party Check
DM player party check room

A carefully constructed marker denoting a point of interest.
DM player character block room

Instrucions:

First click this sign. It will tell you a list of players with their names next to numbers.

Once you see this list, you have to click on one of the 47 signs lined up beside this sign, depending on which player you want to block. When you do click one of the signs, the players character will be made illegal (all his abilities except dexterity will be lowered) and booted, so player will be unable to use this character again.

This is used for punishing players for certain rule braking.

Aldaron
DM Character Block

DM player auto-boot room UNFINISHED

Instrucions:

First click this sign. It will tell you a list of players with their names next to numbers.

Once you see this list, you have to click on one of the 47 signs lined up beside this sign, depending on which player you want to auto-boot. When you do click one of the signs, the player will be teleported to the hall and booted. If the player attempts to return with another character, he will be booted when walking over some of the triggers located around the hall. The player will be unable to exit the hall until the server is restarted.

This is used for punishing players for certain rule braking. It is not as harsh as a ban, because it lasts shorter. It can be considered a warning before a ban.

Aldaron
DM Auto-Boot UNFINISHED

First click on the scribe and during the convo you type your messages in normal "Talk" mode. 

Then you get a "scribed message" item in your inventory.

Then go to wherever you want to place the notice board.

Go into the creator, placables, penants and signs and choose the "Messages from DMs" placable. 

Place it where u want, but consider its facing.

Then click on it while you have the scribed message item on you. Then click on POST MESSAGE and everyone will be able to read it.

Aldaron
How to use this "Scribe"
